sentence_reviews.text: Supervised fine-tuning and instruction tuning train models on curated input–response examples so they follow task descriptions and conversational conventions.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Ouyang arXiv abstract lines 37-40 describes aligning language models by fine-tuning with human feedback, collecting labeler demonstrations of desired behavior, and fine-tuning GPT-3 using supervised learning.
sentence_reviews.notes: The exact instruction-following SFT pipeline is directly supported by the inspected RLHF/InstructGPT source.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Large-scale pretraining.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning is modeled as depending on Supervised learning, Large-scale pretraining and feeding downstream nodes such as Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA, Reward-model training, RLHF & RLAIF, Direct and online preference optimization.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning claim, not an external-world necessity claim.
